column1: AI Adoption by Business Function (% of Orgs Using AI in That Function) — McKinsey Annual Surveys
Source: McKinsey Global Survey on AI. Figures = % of respondent organisations using AI in each function among those that adopted AI in ≥1 function.
Key finding: IT jumped from 27% to 36% in just 6 months (early→late 2024) — fastest growth of any function.

NOTE: Function-level %s reflect share of AI-adopting orgs using AI in that function. McKinsey does not publish all exact % figures; some are reconstructed from ranking data and exhibit descriptions in the reports.
